<?php /** * Time * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * Time * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class Time { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_CHOICE, 'children' => [ 'utcTime' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_UTC_TIME], 'generalTime' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_GENERALIZED_TIME] ] ]; }
